stan_swiata.opis: World Bank issues formal recession warning tied to US-Iran war; oil markets, US military deployment costs, and domestic inflation all at risk.

stan_swiata.temat: Bezpieczeństwo dyplomatyczne USA / atak na konsulat w Toronto
stan_swiata.opis: New incident: attack on US consulate in Toronto with police officer shot; raises questions about threats to US diplomatic facilities in allied countries.
Xi visits Kim Jong-un; China-DPRK axis strengthening complicates US strategic position in Asia.
Gold overtaking dollar as top reserve asset signals long-term erosion of US financial hegemony; indirect but real concern for US economic stability.
